title: EDiT dataset record
description: One record describes one dataset in the EDiT data commons, regardless of whether EDiT hosts it (house), links to it (linked), or a collaborator contributed it (contributed). The record describes the dataset as an object in the world; it does not constrain the dataset's internal content.

id.description: Stable, collision-free identifier. Namespace prefix MUST match the tier: edit: for house, link: for linked, contrib: for contributed. Slug is lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens.

description.description: Plain-language summary of what the dataset contains and where it comes from.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (https://spdx.org/licenses/) for house and contributed tiers. Linked tier may use the sentinel LicenseRef-EXTERNAL when the upstream terms are proprietary or non-SPDX; the human-readable terms then go in distribution.note.

themes.description: Lowercase hyphenated keywords for search and grouping.

temporalResolution.description: ISO-8601 duration (e.g. PT5M, PT15M, PT1H, P1D) or null for non-time-series data.

format.description: Free-text shape label: parquet, csv, json-timeseries, hdf5-waveforms, geojson, XML-via-API, etc. Names the shape; does not constrain it.

access.description: direct = EDiT serves the bytes; link-only = EDiT points to an upstream source and never re-hosts.

note.description: Access caveats: registration walls, tokens, citation requirements, or human-readable proprietary terms.

loader.description: Machine-actionable load snippet for the playground. MUST be null when one-click load cannot be guaranteed (typically link-only datasets).

variables.description: Either a structured list of fields (preferred for data you control) or a free-text pointer to upstream documentation (for linked data you don't fully control).

allOf.$comment: Namespace prefix must agree with tier.
House and contributed tiers must carry a real SPDX id, not the external sentinel.
